paper_time_boundary.selection_method: Latest repository commit returned by the GitHub commits API at or before the immutable arXiv v1 publication timestamp. This is a timing boundary, not proof that the study executed this exact commit.

current_boundary.comparison: The linked subtree tree object is byte-identical between the selected pre-publication commit and current HEAD. A second archive would therefore duplicate the same package content and was not saved.

inspection.scope_note: Archive inspection confirmed procedural SKILL.md modules under Evidence Insight and Protocol Design and execution-oriented modules under Data Analysis, including differential expression, enrichment, immune-infiltration, feature-selection, calibration, validation, and programmed-cell-death/immune-oncology planning surfaces. This acquisition record does not establish which exact modules were accessed, routed, adopted, or executed in any of the 21 study outputs.
